data.title: Metropolitan Bank Stockholders Approve Proposals at Annual Meeting
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Metropolitan Bank Holding ( (MCB) ) has shared an update.

On April 29, 2026, Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders, with approximately 85% of outstanding shares represented in person or by proxy. Stockholders elected four directors, Anthony J. Fabiano, Robert C. Patent, Maria Fiorini Ramirez, and William Reinhardt, to serve until the 2029 Annual Meeting or until their successors are duly elected and qualified.

Investors also approved on a non-binding advisory basis the compensation of the company’s named executive officers for 2025, signaling general support for current pay practices. In addition, stockholders ratified the appointment of Crowe LLP as the independent auditor for the 2026 fiscal year and approved the 2026 Employee Stock Purchase Plan, reinforcing the company’s governance framework and employee ownership incentives.

The most recent analyst rating on (MCB) stock is a Buy with a $109.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Metropolitan Bank Holding stock, see the MCB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MCB is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by attractive valuation (low P/E) and constructive operating/guidance signals from the latest call (loan growth pipeline, improving NIM outlook, and strong profitability). Financial performance is solid but tempered by margin compression and volatile cash flow, while technicals are supportive with a steady uptrend and neutral-to-positive momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on MCB stock, click here.

More about Metropolitan Bank Holding

Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. operates as the holding company for Metropolitan Commercial Bank, a U.S.-based financial institution that offers commercial banking services. The company focuses on serving small and middle-market businesses, professionals, and individual customers with a range of deposit, lending, and payment solutions in its core metropolitan markets.

Average Trading Volume: 175,062

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.13B

data.title: Regency Centers Reports Strong Q1 2026 Earnings and Outlook
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Regency Centers ( (REG) ).

Regency Centers reported solid first-quarter 2026 results on April 29, with net income attributable to common shareholders rising to $0.68 per diluted share from $0.58 a year earlier and Nareit FFO increasing to $1.20 per diluted share. Core operating earnings climbed to $1.16 per diluted share, while same-property NOI grew 4.4% and overall NOI advanced 8.4%, reflecting healthy leasing momentum and rent growth.

Portfolio fundamentals remained strong as same-property occupancy was 96.6% leased and 94.3% commenced at March 31, 2026, with anchors 98.2% leased and shop space 94.1%. The company executed 1.5 million square feet of comparable new and renewal leases in the quarter at double-digit cash rent spreads, underscoring robust tenant demand and supporting its strategy of stable, income-generating retail centers.

Regency advanced its development pipeline, starting $73 million of redevelopment projects and completing $42 million of ground-up and redevelopment work, contributing to $635 million of in-process projects at an estimated 9% blended yield. It also acquired the remaining 60% interest in Haddon Commons in New Jersey, expanding full ownership in a shopping center asset and signaling continued selective capital deployment.

The balance sheet remained a focal point, with pro-rata net debt and preferred stock to trailing 12-month operating EBITDAre at 5.2x and roughly $1.5 billion of availability on its revolving credit facility at quarter-end. Regency’s operating partnership priced $450 million of senior unsecured notes due 2033 at a 4.50% coupon, and the board refreshed a share repurchase authorization of up to $500 million, enhancing financial flexibility and potential shareholder returns.

Management reaffirmed 2026 guidance for Nareit FFO, core operating earnings and same-property NOI growth, while modestly raising the net income per share outlook and increasing planned development and redevelopment spending and acquisition volume. The updated guidance points to continued investment in the development platform and selective acquisitions, reinforcing Regency’s positioning as a leading owner of grocery-anchored retail centers with durable earnings and a pipeline to support future growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (REG) stock is a Buy with a $88.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Regency Centers stock, see the REG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on REG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, REG is a Outperform.

REG scores well on durable cash flow and a positive, fundamentals-backed earnings outlook, supported by constructive price trends. The overall score is tempered by the latest-period revenue/margin volatility, somewhat higher leverage, and a relatively high P/E despite a solid dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on REG stock, click here.

More about Regency Centers

Regency Centers Corporation is a U.S.-based real estate investment trust focused on owning, operating and developing grocery-anchored and necessity-based shopping centers in strong trade areas. The company emphasizes high-quality retail properties, development and redevelopment projects, and maintains a conservative balance sheet to support long-term growth in the open-air shopping center sector.

Average Trading Volume: 1,364,145

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $14.64B

Find detailed analytics on REG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An announcement from Interactive Brokers ( (IBKR) ) is now available.

Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. held its annual meeting of stockholders on April 23, 2026, where shareholders elected ten directors to the board for one-year terms ending at the 2027 annual meeting. All nominees, including founder Thomas Peterffy and other incumbent directors, were approved by substantial majorities, underscoring continuity in the company’s governance structure.

Stockholders also ratified the appointment of Deloitte as independent auditor for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026, and supported the advisory vote on executive compensation. In addition, investors approved an amendment to extend the company’s 2007 Stock Incentive Plan through April 24, 2037, a move that secures a long-term equity compensation framework and may help Interactive Brokers retain and incentivize key executives and employees over the next decade.

The most recent analyst rating on (IBKR) stock is a Buy with a $93.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Interactive Brokers stock, see the IBKR Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IBKR is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (profitability, cash generation, and improving returns) and a very constructive earnings call highlighting record revenues and strong activity/balance growth. These are tempered by overbought technical signals and a less attractive valuation (higher P/E, low yield), with rate-sensitivity to potential cuts a notable risk.

data.title: Green Brick Partners Announces Multi-Year Financial Statement Restatement
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Green Brick Partners ( (GRBK) ) has provided an update.

Green Brick Partners said on April 29, 2026 that it will restate its consolidated statements of income for full years 2023, 2024 and 2025, as well as certain 2025 quarters, after determining that residential unit revenue had been incorrectly reported on a gross basis and excluded closing cost incentives such as interest-rate buy-downs. The restatement will lower reported residential unit revenue and average sales prices while reducing reported homebuilding costs and boosting gross margin, but the company stressed that gross profit, operating income, net income, earnings per share, cash flow, equity, debt covenant compliance and the underlying economics of its business remain unchanged, with all figures still preliminary and subject to audit and completion of the amended 2025 annual report.

The most recent analyst rating on (GRBK) stock is a Hold with a $71.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Green Brick Partners stock, see the GRBK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GRBK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GRBK is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial quality—especially a very strong, low-leverage balance sheet—plus an inexpensive P/E. This is moderated by a neutral-to-mixed technical picture and earnings-call signals of near-term housing-cycle headwinds (margin pressure, higher incentives, and weaker backlog metrics) despite ongoing operational and strategic initiatives.

To see Spark’s full report on GRBK stock, click here.

More about Green Brick Partners

Green Brick Partners Inc. is a homebuilding and residential land development company focused on constructing and selling residential units. The company generates revenue primarily from residential unit sales and related homebuilding activities, and its performance is closely tied to housing demand and pricing dynamics in its operating markets.

Average Trading Volume: 218,246

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.06B

Find detailed analytics on GRBK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

AutoNation ( (AN) ) has provided an update.

On January 28, 2026, AutoNation’s board approved a new 2026 Employee Equity and Incentive Plan, which was subsequently cleared by shareholders on April 28, 2026, replacing the 2017 plan while preserving existing awards. The new plan authorizes up to 2,158,316 shares for a mix of stock- and cash-based awards to employees and contractors, and its administration has been delegated to the board’s compensation committee.

At the April 28, 2026 annual meeting, shareholders re-elected nine directors, ratified KPMG LLP as auditor for 2026, and approved executive compensation and the new equity plan, while rejecting stockholder proposals calling for an independent board chair and a greenhouse gas report. The outcome consolidates existing governance and compensation structures, signaling continued board control over leadership arrangements and sustainability disclosure practices.

The most recent analyst rating on (AN) stock is a Hold with a $207.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AutoNation stock, see the AN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weaker financial quality versus prior years (margin compression, high leverage in 2022–2024, and volatile/declining cash generation) and soft technical momentum. These are partly offset by a relatively modest P/E valuation and an earnings-call outlook that emphasizes stable profitability, strong cash generation/capital returns, and continued growth in aftersales and AN Finance despite a slightly weaker 2026 market backdrop.

To see Spark’s full report on AN stock, click here.

More about AutoNation

AutoNation, Inc. is a U.S.-based automotive retailer that operates franchised dealerships selling new and used vehicles, related services, and associated automotive products to consumers across its network. The company focuses on retail automotive sales, financing, and service operations, positioning itself as a large player in the vehicle distribution and after-sales service industry.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

The latest update is out from Green Brick Partners ( (GRBK) ).

Green Brick Partners announced that on June 15, 2026 it will pay a quarterly dividend to holders of record as of June 1, 2026 of its Series A depositary shares, which each represent a 1/1,000th interest in a share of 5.75% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock. The dividend, covering the period from March 15, 2026 through June 14, 2026, will be $359.38 per share of Series A Preferred Stock, or $0.35938 per depositary share, reflecting an annualized 5.75% rate on the $25,000 per-share liquidation preference, equivalent to $25 per depositary share.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Vertex Pharmaceuticals ( (VRTX) ) is now available.

On April 28, 2026, Vertex Pharmaceuticals said director Suketu Upadhyay informed its board that he would not stand for re‑election at the company’s 2026 annual meeting, as he has been named the forthcoming chief financial officer of Incyte Corporation and faces scheduling conflicts. Upadhyay, who will serve on the board until the meeting and has no disagreements with Vertex on operations or policies, will be removed from the proxy slate, prompting the board to reduce its size to ten members while keeping the remaining director nominees and all previously submitted proxies—other than votes for Upadhyay—intact for the 2026 shareholder vote.

The most recent analyst rating on (VRTX) stock is a Hold with a $441.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vertex Pharmaceuticals stock, see the VRTX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VRTX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VRTX is a Outperform.

The score is supported by strong fundamentals (high margins, solid 2025 profitability, conservative leverage) and a constructive earnings outlook with 2026 growth guidance and advancing launches/pipeline. It is held back by weak current technical momentum and the company’s recent volatility in earnings and cash flow (notably the 2024 downturn) alongside near-term margin/tax headwinds from higher 2026 investment and a higher expected tax rate.

To see Spark’s full report on VRTX stock, click here.

More about Vertex Pharmaceuticals

Vertex Pharmaceuticals is a global biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing therapies for serious diseases, particularly in areas such as cystic fibrosis and other specialty conditions. The company operates in the biopharmaceutical industry, targeting high‑unmet‑need patient populations with innovative, often highly specialized treatments.

data.title: PC Connection Posts Strong Q1 Results, Declares Dividend
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

PC Connection ( (CNXN) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 29, 2026, Connection reported first-quarter 2026 results showing net sales up 3% year on year to $721.9 million and gross billings up 4.3% to $1.0 billion, while net income jumped 27.8% to $17.2 million and diluted EPS rose to $0.68. The same day, the board declared a quarterly dividend of $0.20 per share, payable May 29, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 12, 2026, underscoring management’s confidence despite a mixed performance across segments.

Enterprise Solutions led growth with a 16.3% increase in net sales to $346.5 million and stronger margins, while Business Solutions posted mid-single-digit sales growth but slightly lower gross margin, and Public Sector Solutions saw a 31% sales decline even as its margin improved. Product demand was strongest in software and networking, and the company held SG&A roughly flat, absorbed $3.1 million in severance tied to cost reductions, maintained over $411 million in cash and investments, modestly repurchased shares, and increased trailing 12-month adjusted EBITDA by 7%, signaling ongoing emphasis on efficiency and positioning around customers’ transition from AI experimentation to production workloads.

Spark’s Take on CNXN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CNXN is a Outperform.

The score is driven mainly by strong financial resilience (exceptionally low leverage) and a positive earnings call outlook (backlog strength, improving profitability, cost savings, and shareholder returns). Technicals are supportive with the stock above key moving averages, though momentum appears somewhat stretched. Valuation is fair but not notably cheap, and recent revenue contraction/cash-flow variability remain the primary fundamental risks.

To see Spark’s full report on CNXN stock, click here.

More about PC Connection

Connection (PC Connection, Inc.; NASDAQ: CNXN) is a Fortune 1000 information technology solutions provider serving business, government, healthcare, and education customers across the United States and internationally. The company delivers custom-configured IT products and services, including hardware, software, networking and accessories, through its Technology Integration and Distribution Center, specialized business units, and its GlobalServe subsidiary for global IT procurement and service management.

Connection Business Solutions focuses on small- and medium-sized businesses, offering rapid-response access to more than 460,000 brand-name IT products via technically trained account managers, print publications, and its e-commerce platform. The company emphasizes certified technical expertise, with thousands of professional certifications enabling it to address complex customer infrastructure and technology transformation needs in a competitive IT services market.

Average Trading Volume: 82,034

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.61B

See more insights into CNXN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
